understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the '+'-tile (goal gem) by navigating a tile grid with gravity-affected movement, avoiding spikes ('u'/'v'), and using CLICK to remove breakable blocks ('x') to open paths. Each level had 2 attempts of 50 turns.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal moves (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT) trigger gravity to pull the character until landing on a solid tile, spike, or goal. CLICK removes a targeted breakable block (no turn advance for platform timer). UNDO reverts the last action. Spike tiles cause instant failure. The corridor_scan showed landing positions for each column to identify passages.
